title: Extraction of PLFA from Wood Debris
author: Unknown

steps.title: Mixed the extraction solution with the samples by vortexing
steps.instruction: Mixed the extraction solution with the samples by vortexing. The extraction solution is composed of three solvent. They are PBS (6ML,pH 7.4 ), Methanol (12ML), Choloroform (6ML). undetermined, extraction solution

steps.title: vortex the mixture for 30s undetermined, 0
steps.instruction: vortex the mixture for 30s undetermined, 0.56% (w/v) KOH in dried methanol undetermined, tolunene:methanol (1:1)
